programmes.show_description: Naidheachdan ionadail, nàiseanta is eadar-nàiseanta gach madainn. Local, national and international news each morning.
Cuimhneachan air Tormod A Dòmhnallach OBE, à Ùig, Leòdhais. In tribute to Norman A MacDonald OBE, who passed away earlier this week.
Tha i beachdail, tha i beòthail agus tha i feitheamh ribh le taghadh ciùil. Morag MacDonald presents her great choice of traditional Gaelic music.
Naidheachdan, còmhradh, spòrs, ceòl agus fealla-dhà le Niall Iain. News, chat, sport, music and entertainment with Niall Iain.
Ceòl Ceilteach agus fiosrachadh air na tha dol agaibhse. Gaelic and Celtic music and a round-up of what's on. Post-d - dethadol@bbc.co.uk.
Mìcheal Steele le taghadh de cheòl na pìoba. Mìcheal Steele presents a selection of pipe music.
Naidheachdan nàiseanta is ionadail.  Local, national and international news.
Ceòl, fealla-dhà agus sùil air spòrs ionadail, nàiseanta agus eadar-nàiseanta. Music and entertainment with Derek Pluto Murray along with his Musical Links. Tweet @DerekPluto.
Sùil air adhart gu seusan ùr a' bhuill-coise airson sgiobaidhean Uibhist is Bharraigh. Javen and guests take a look ahead to the new season for the Uist and Barra Football League.
Cluinnidh sinn mu na pìosan ciùil a tha air buaidh a thoirt air aoigh na seachdain Fionnlagh Mac a' Phiocair. We hear the music that has influenced Finlay MacVicar.
